funding_alignment_sensitivity: positive under only one signed alignment is tagged sensitive and cannot be promoted as robust funding-adjusted evidence

aggregate_base_net_mean_bps.formula: mean of market-day means after 14bps, adverse exact dual alignment, and q95 missing-hour cost

aggregate_stress_net_mean_bps.formula: mean of market-day means after 32bps, adverse exact dual alignment, and q99 missing-hour cost

candidate_return_correlation.formula: aligned equal-market-day base-net series; fewer than 3 overlaps is missing/worst=1

capital_occupancy.formula: sum holding seconds/(eligible symbols*eligible interval seconds)

cluster_bootstrap_lower_bound_bps.formula: 5th percentile of 2000 market-day cluster resamples with replacement; seed 20260720

left_tail_utility_bps.formula: negative maximum peak-to-trough drawdown of chronological equal-day base-net cumulative bps

median_inner_fold_base_net_mean_bps.formula: type-7 p=.5 of inner-fold aggregate base means

p20_inner_fold_base_net_mean_bps.formula: type-7 p=.2 of inner-fold aggregate base means

symbol_day_year_contribution.formula: absolute base-net contribution by symbol/day/year divided by total absolute contribution

primary_weighting: equal weight trades inside UTC market day; equal weight market days
